mechanics.excerpt: Of course, laser pistol block of C8 can usually accomplish the same job ~it"s just noisier and leaves evidence behind Baslc Lock Pick Set (VIbro Lock Plck Set): The basic set contains picks; probes bars; wrenches pliers and the Iike; in short; everything needed to bypass mechanical locking mech- anism_ For cases where ess subtlety required_ small vibro blade that can cut through lock's internal workings can be included (for substantially greater price). This kit allows char- acter t0 use Security Systems Skill on mechanica locks without suffering Lack of Proper Equipment Modifier.
